mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.created_by AS user_id, t.title, t.cover_image_url, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.is_active, t.created_at, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS record_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.content IS NOT NULL AND r.content != '' THEN r.id END) AS diary_count FROM trip t LEFT JOIN record r ON t.id = r.trip_id WHERE t.created_by = #{userId} GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT t.id, t.created_by AS user_id, t.title, t.cover_image_url, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.is_active, t.created_at, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS record_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.content IS NOT NULL AND r.content != '' THEN r.id END) AS diary_count FROM trip t LEFT JOIN record r ON t.id = r.trip_id WHERE t.id = #{id} GROUP BY t.id
